title: dryopteris filix-mas var. khasiana
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas var. khasiana, also known as Himalayan male fern, is a variety of fern native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its distinctive fronds and unique habitat requirements. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris filix-mas var. khasiana include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it as a tea, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
